description_long: This object is a modern laptop with a slim, rectangular profile and a large, light blue display screen. The keyboard is full-sized, featuring a standard QWERTY layout with clearly defined keys, including a function row and a numeric keypad on the right. The chassis is predominantly black, with a smooth, matte finish and a wide touchpad centered below the keyboard. The hinge mechanism is visible, connecting the screen to the base, and the overall design is minimalist with no visible branding or stickers. The laptop appears to be constructed from a combination of plastic and metal, giving it a sturdy yet lightweight appearance.
description: A sleek, black laptop with a large blue screen, full keyboard, and minimalist design. The surface is smooth and matte, with no visible branding or stickers.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full keyboard, large blue screen, and centered touchpad.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile, open hinge, and slim screen.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid black back of the laptop with no visible features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the thinness of the device and the open screen angle.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and appears to be off, displaying a blank light blue color with no visible content.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout with a function row and numeric keypad; all keys are clearly visible.
